title: viola websteri
intro: Viola websteri is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the violet family, native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Viola websteri have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Viola websteri include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments for therapeutic benefits.
